_meta.source: live event store, read-only (harness.sqlite events table, action payloads)
_meta.purpose: capture-first groundwork for #93 (market-awareness surfacing) and #152 (broken purchasing); L-15/L-16 — never guess a response shape
_meta.redactions: no session ids, tokens, or account identifiers present in action result texts; station names are public game text
limitations: The event store truncates action result texts at 120 characters, so multi-line sell Fills tables are cut mid-row. Full Fills shapes need a live capture at execution time, not from the store.
view_orders and analyze_market have NEVER been executed by the pilot — they appear only in operator steer text. Their response shapes are uncapturable offline.

get_missions raw listing is not persisted: the 2026-07-13 18:23Z deploy (a514def) injects the mission listing into the planner prompt (promptChars 25126 on the 18:26Z docked replan) but stores no event for it. Only the downstream accept_mission success proves the listing carried a usable template_id.
No action in the store lists purchasable items or prices at a station. Dock results are a bare 'Docked at X.' line. What a docked player sees as buyable is uncapturable offline.
key_facts: buy expects an exact snake_case item ID (e.g. 'iron_ore') or full name (e.g. 'Iron Ore') — per the game's own invalid_item error text.

'fuel_cells' is NOT a valid item id: buy id=fuel_cells returns invalid_item, yet refuel's no_fuel_cells error says 'Buy fuel cells from a market or craft them.' The correct fuel-cell item id is unknown from the store — this contradiction is the heart of #152.
Mission template_id format is a snake_case template name (copper_requisition), not a UUID.
Sell Fills tables reveal buyer identity per fill (source=station, buyer=<station name>), so successful sells do surface who bought — but pre-sale buyer discovery (view_orders) remains unobserved.

entries.result_text: invalid_item: Unknown item 'fuel_cells'. Use exact item ID (e.g. 'iron_ore') or full name (e.g. 'Iron Ore').
not_docked: You must be docked at a station to perform this action. Use 'dock' at a POI with a station, or use 'get_poi' to check if your current location has a station.
Another action is already in progress for this player
entries.note: harness-side concurrency gate, not a game response; all 84 'wait' buys are this text

entries.result_text: no_fuel_cells: No fuel cells found in cargo. Buy fuel cells from a market or craft them.
entries.note: contradicts buy invalid_item for 'fuel_cells' — the real item id for fuel cells is unconfirmed
station refuel spends credits directly without a buy action

entries.result_text: Appreciated, pilot. The asteroid belts should have what we need. Template: copper_requisition. Expires: 2026-07-15T18:26

entries.result_text: invalid_payload: Must provide template_id (or mission_id) to accept a mission.
accept_mission needs a template_id (or id) from get_missions first
entries.note: harness-side gate added 2026-07-13, not game text
